title: Well-Known Labels, Annotations and Taints — cronjob.kubernetes.io/instantiate
text:
Type: Annotation
Example:
cronjob.kubernetes.io/instantiate: "manual"
Used on: Jobs
When you use
kubectl create job
with the
--from=cronjob/<cronjob-name>
flag to manually create a Job from an existing CronJob template,
kubectl
sets this annotation on the newly created Job.
The value of this annotation is always
manual
. This annotation allows you to distinguish
Jobs that were created on demand by a user from Jobs that the CronJob controller automatically creates on their scheduled time.
